free_text: The (p,d) reaction on Fe-56 at 24.6 MeV.
The target consisted of a self-supporting foil of
isotopically enriched (99.9%) Fe-56 with a
thickness of about 1 mg/cm**2.
The Eindhoven AVF cyclotron.
Experim. method.
Analysing powers. DWBA and CRC calculations.
Four telescopes each consisting of a
combination of a 200 um and a 2 mm thick silicon
detector.
The estimated accuracy in the normalisation.
No information about source of uncertainty
By CAJAD.
Some cosmetic corrections.
